room.caption: [NightmareC5] This fight wasn't changed at all, it was simply an abrupt rule change to the shadows. Now it all fits together better.

instance.creationCode:
GID_SET(344043, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=144 newMapY=304 toRoom=rExtGateC_1 newDraw=1 image_blend=c_maroon
var instrProg; instrProg=string_char_at(global.eGateProg,3) if instrProg="8" {instance_destroy()}
